caption: A video clip captures a simulated American football game in a stadium with green turf and white yard lines. In the initial scene, a player in a black jersey with the number 43 pursues a player in a white jersey with the number 7. As the action progresses, the black-jerseyed player tackles the white-jerseyed player to the ground. By the end of the sequence, the player in white is lying on the turf while another player in black stands nearby. A player in a black jersey with the number 17 is also visible. The text "First Down" appears on the screen during the final moment. Throughout the clip, a small inset window in the bottom left corner shows a blond man in a dark blue shirt sitting in front of a Christmas tree. In the background, coaches and other players are visible on the sidelines.
